title: Create and save multiple people filters in the Capacity Planner

posts.author: ANNAA (Anna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Create and save “people” filters for multiple teams in the Resource manager.

What are you trying to achieve

Improve usability for Resource managers to filter on various teams that report to them especially since you can’t map Viewers to a resource manager.

posts.author: sanmart (sanmart)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing this idea, Anna. This would be a very helpful improvement for resource managers. Being able to create and save people filters for different teams would make the Capacity Planner much easier and faster to use, especially when managing multiple teams. It would also help work around the current limitation where viewers can’t be mapped to a resource manager. Appreciate you taking the time to explain the use case clearly.
